settingsPage.slugHint: The slug cannot be changed after the business is created.

localization.hint: Set when the business was created. To change the country, currency, or language, contact support.

settingsPage.cancellationHint: Minimum time before the scheduled slot for the customer to cancel.
settingsPage.bufferHint: Preparation time between the end of one service and the start of the next.
settingsPage.autoApproveHint: When enabled, new bookings are approved automatically, without manual staff review.
settingsPage.minBookingAdvanceHint: Minimum time, in hours, between the moment of booking and the customer's desired slot.
settingsPage.maxBookingAdvanceHint: How many days ahead a customer can search for available slots.
settingsPage.slotGranularityHint: Size of the slot granularity on bookings.
settingsPage.welcomeStaffScreenHint: Number of days shown on the staff dashboard for action-needed and upcoming bookings.
settingsPage.pointsHint: How many points equal 1 currency unit (e.g. 10 = 10 pts → $1). Zero disables the points discount.
settingsPage.loyaltyEnableNotificationsHint: Turns the expiring-points reminder emails on or off entirely.
settingsPage.expiryWarningHint: Days before expiry that the expiring-points reminder is sent.
settingsPage.notificationMinPointsHint: Minimum expiring points balance required for the reminder to be sent to the customer.
settingsPage.notificationFromEmailHint: Address used as the sender for automatic emails. If empty, uses the system's default sender.
settingsPage.addressHint: Optional — fill in every field to show the address on the site, or leave them all blank.
settingsPage.addressZipNotFound: Address not found. Please fill in manually.
settingsPage.actionHint: Settings affect new bookings. Business hours and timezone take effect immediately.
settingsPage.successBody: Your changes have been applied. New bookings already follow the new rules.

errors.cancellationWindowMax: The maximum value is 720 hours (30 days).
errors.maxBookingAdvanceDaysInvalid: Enter a value of at least 1 day.
errors.slotGranularityInvalid: Select a valid interval (15, 30, or 60 minutes).
errors.welcomeStaffScreenDaysRange: Enter a value between 1 and 90 days.
errors.expiryRange: Enter a value between 1 and 3650 days.
errors.expiryWarningRange: Enter a value between 1 and 90 days.
errors.expiryWarningMustBeLessThanExpiry: The expiry warning must be less than the points validity.
errors.addressStateInvalid: Invalid state — use the 2-letter code (e.g. MG).
errors.addressZipCodeInvalid: Invalid ZIP code. Use the format 00000-000.
errors.submitFailed: Could not save the settings. Please try again.
errors.renamePartialFailure: Settings were saved, but the business name could not be updated. Please try again.
